assignment.title: Body Fluid Evidence Case Studies Assignment
assignment.instructor_text:
There are a number of historical case studies where blood stain and/or spatter evidence was used to successfully solve a crime and convict the perpetrator(s).  Demonstrate your understanding of forensic serology by completing the following assignment.

Assignment Instructions

Complete the following assignment about using body fluid evidence to solve crimes. Click on the image below to make a copy of the Body Fluid Evidence Case Studies Assignment.  Remember to double click on the header to open it and add your name to the document.

When you have completed the assignment, upload it below and select Submit to complete your submission.

Revisit the Course Information section if you need a refresher on how to submit your assignments.
